## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the [DCO](../CONTRIBUTING.md#sign-your-commits-dco)
- [ ] PR is focused on a single logical change
